narrative:
Perry 10 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,160 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points.
